case_title: HILL, KYNATTAH VS TOWER VALET PARKING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HILL, KYNATTAH AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, KYNATTAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING COMPANY JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT. AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF. IN SCA 27953 ON 12/14/05. EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT NOT SERVED. NEED TO RESET COURT DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-03-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-01-2005 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, KYNATTAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING COMPANY $2,874.76 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,921.76, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT SHARE RESPONDIBILITY FOR THIS ACCIDENT-- PLAINTIFF-40% AND DEFENDANT 60% STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING COMPANY
